headline: Teamsters submit concerns about Paramount-Warner merger to DOJ
summary: “The International Brotherhood of Teamsters told the Department of Justice this week that the proposed merger between Paramount Skydance (PSKY) and Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD) poses a direct threat to film and television workers nationwide, including nearly 15,000 rank-and-file Motion Picture Teamsters. The 1.3-million-member union submitted a detailed report this week to the DOJ’s Antitrust Division outlining these concerns and is urging the DOJ to intervene and block the deal unless substanti

headline: Amazon to hike price of ad-free Prime Video tier by $2 a month
summary: Amazon is boosting the price of Prime Video to $4.99 a month in the U.S., from $2.99 per month for users who want to avoid ads.

raw.headline: Amazon to hike price of ad-free Prime Video tier by $2 a month

headline: Not expecting the Iran war to change long-term business values, says Harris Oarkmark's Bill Nygren
summary: Bill Nygren, Harris Oarkmark Funds partner, portfolio manager and U.S. CIO, joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the latest market trends, impact of the Iran war, Warner Bros. Discovery-Paramount Skydance deal, and more.
